org.jscience.social.linguistics.ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult

Packages that use ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.linguistics
Provides mathematical and computational models for natural language processing, linguistic analysis, and glottochronology.

  • Uses of ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult in org.jscience.social.linguistics

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.automatedReadabilityIndex(String text)
    Calculates the Automated Readability Index (ARI).
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.colemanLiauIndex(String text)
    Calculates the Coleman-Liau Index based on character and sentence counts.
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.fleschKincaidGradeLevel(String text)
    Calculates the Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level.
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.fleschReadingEase(String text)
    Calculates the Flesch Reading Ease score.
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.gunningFogIndex(String text)
    Calculates the Gunning Fog Index.
    static ReadabilityIndex.ReadabilityResult
    ReadabilityIndex.smogIndex(String text)
    Calculates the SMOG (Simple Measure of Gobbledygook) Index.
